scripts.sync: cp /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/karabiner.edn ~/.config/ && goku && jq 'if (.profiles | map(.name) | index("None")) then . else .profiles += [{"complex_modifications": {"rules": []}, "name": "None", "selected": false}] end' ~/.config/karabiner/karabiner.json > /tmp/karabiner-temp.json && mv /tmp/karabiner-temp.json ~/.config/karabiner/karabiner.json && osascript -e 'display notification "Done syncing" with title "Karabiner"'
